ps3.3:2.1.pli: Hañci cittena abhisameti, tena hi aññāṇī abhisameti?

ps3.3:3.1.pli: Hañci ñāṇena abhisameti, tena hi acittena ca ñāṇena ca acittako abhisameti?

ps3.3:4.1.pli: Hañci cittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti, tena hi kāmāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:4.2.pli: Na kāmāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:5.1.pli: Tena hi rūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:5.2.pli: Na rūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:6.1.pli: Tena hi arūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:6.2.pli: Na arūpāvacaracittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:7.1.pli: Tena hi kammassakatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:7.2.pli: Na kammassakatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:8.1.pli: Tena hi saccānulomikacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:8.2.pli: Na saccānulomikacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:9.1.pli: Tena hi atītacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:9.2.pli: Na atītacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:10.1.pli: Tena hi anāgatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:10.2.pli: Na anāgatacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:11.1.pli: Tena hi paccuppannalokiyacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:11.2.pli: Na paccuppannalokiyacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:11.3.pli: Lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe paccuppannacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:12.1.pli: Kathaṁ lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe paccuppannacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti?

ps3.3:12.2.pli: Lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe uppādādhipateyyaṁ cittaṁ ñāṇassa hetu paccayo ca taṁsampayuttaṁ nirodhagocaraṁ dassanādhipateyyaṁ ñāṇaṁ cittassa hetu paccayo ca taṁsampayuttaṁ ñāṇaṁ nirodhagocaraṁ.

ps3.3:12.3.pli: Evaṁ lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe paccuppannacittena ca ñāṇena ca abhisameti.

ps3.3:13.3.pli: Lokuttaramaggakkhaṇe dassanābhisamayo sammādiṭṭhi, abhiniropanābhisamayo sammāsaṅkappo, pariggahābhisamayo sammāvācā, samuṭṭhānābhisamayo sammākammanto, vodānābhisamayo sammāājīvo, paggahābhisamayo sammāvāyāmo, upaṭṭhānābhisamayo sammāsati, avikkhepābhisamayo sammāsamādhi;

ps3.3:13.4.pli: upaṭṭhānābhisamayo satisambojjhaṅgo, pavicayābhisamayo dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgo, paggahābhisamayo vīriyasambojjhaṅgo, pharaṇābhisamayo pītisambojjhaṅgo, upasamābhisamayo passaddhisambojjhaṅgo, avikkhepābhisamayo samādhisambojjhaṅgo, paṭisaṅkhānābhisamayo upekkhāsambojjhaṅgo;

ps3.3:13.5.pli: assaddhiye akampiyābhisamayo saddhābalaṁ, kosajje akampiyābhisamayo vīriyabalaṁ, pamāde akampiyābhisamayo satibalaṁ, uddhacce akampiyābhisamayo samādhibalaṁ, avijjāya akampiyābhisamayo paññābalaṁ;

ps3.3:13.6.pli: adhimokkhābhisamayo saddhindriyaṁ, paggahābhisamayo vīriyindriyaṁ, upaṭṭhānābhisamayo satindriyaṁ, avikkhepābhisamayo samādhindriyaṁ, dassanābhisamayo paññindriyaṁ.

ps3.3:13.7.pli: Ādhipateyyaṭṭhena indriyābhisamayo, akampiyaṭṭhena balābhisamayo, niyyānaṭṭhena bojjhaṅgābhisamayo, hetuṭṭhena maggābhisamayo, upaṭṭhānaṭṭhena satipaṭṭhānābhisamayo, padahaṭṭhena sammappadhānābhisamayo, ijjhanaṭṭhena iddhipādābhisamayo, tathaṭṭhena saccābhisamayo, avikkhepaṭṭhena samathābhisamayo, anupassanaṭṭhena vipassanābhisamayo, ekarasaṭṭhena samathavipassanābhisamayo, anativattanaṭṭhena yuganaddhābhisamayo, saṁvaraṭṭhena sīlavisuddhiabhisamayo, avikkhepaṭṭhena visuddhiabhisamayo, dassanaṭṭhena diṭṭhivisuddhiabhisamayo, muttaṭṭhena vimokkhābhisamayo, paṭivedhaṭṭhena vijjābhisamayo, pariccāgaṭṭhena vimuttiabhisamayo, samucchedaṭṭhena khaye ñāṇaṁ abhisamayo.

ps3.3:13.8.pli: Chando mūlaṭṭhena abhisamayo, manasikāro samuṭṭhānaṭṭhena abhisamayo, phasso samodhānaṭṭhena abhisamayo, vedanā samosaraṇaṭṭhena abhisamayo, samādhi pamukhaṭṭhena abhisamayo, sati ādhipateyyaṭṭhena abhisamayo, paññā taduttaraṭṭhena abhisamayo, vimutti sāraṭṭhena abhisamayo, amatogadhaṁ nibbānaṁ pariyosānaṭṭhena abhisamayo.

ps3.3:17.1.pli: Yvāyaṁ kilese pajahati, atīte kilese pajahati …pe…

ps3.3:17.2.pli: anāgate kilese pajahati, paccuppanne kilese pajahati, atīte kilese pajahatīti.

ps3.3:17.3.pli: Hañci atīte kilese pajahati, tena hi khīṇaṁ khepeti, niruddhaṁ nirodheti, vigataṁ vigameti, atthaṅgataṁ atthaṅgameti, atītaṁ yaṁ na atthi taṁ pajahatīti?

ps3.3:17.6.pli: Hañci anāgate kilese pajahati, tena hi ajātaṁ pajahati, anibbattaṁ pajahati, anuppannaṁ pajahati, apātubhūtaṁ pajahati, anāgataṁ yaṁ na atthi taṁ pajahatīti?

ps3.3:17.9.pli: Hañci paccuppanne kilese pajahati, tena hi ratto rāgaṁ pajahati, duṭṭho dosaṁ pajahati, mūḷho mohaṁ pajahati, vinibaddho mānaṁ pajahati, parāmaṭṭho diṭṭhiṁ pajahati, vikkhepagato uddhaccaṁ pajahati, aniṭṭhaṅgato vicikicchaṁ pajahati, thāmagato anusayaṁ pajahati, kaṇhasukkadhammā yuganaddhā samameva vattanti, saṅkilesikā maggabhāvanā hoti?

ps3.3:18.1.pli: Na hi atīte kilese pajahati, na anāgate kilese pajahati, na paccuppanne kilese pajahatīti.

ps3.3:18.2.pli: Hañci na atīte kilese pajahati, na anāgate …pe…

ps3.3:18.3.pli: na paccuppanne kilese pajahati, tena hi natthi maggabhāvanā, natthi phalasacchikiriyā, natthi kilesappahānaṁ, natthi dhammābhisamayoti?

ps3.3:18.4.pli: Atthi maggabhāvanā, atthi phalasacchikiriyā, atthi kilesappahānaṁ, atthi dhammābhisamayo.

ps3.3:18.8.pli: Ye tassa rukkhassa ajātaphalā, te ajātāyeva na jāyanti, anibbattāyeva na nibbattanti, anuppannāyeva na uppajjanti, apātubhūtāyeva na pātubhavanti.

ps3.3:18.9.pli: Evamevaṁ uppādo hetu, uppādo paccayo kilesānaṁ nibbattiyāti.

ps3.3:18.10.pli: Uppāde ādīnavaṁ disvā anuppāde cittaṁ pakkhandati.

ps3.3:18.11.pli: Anuppāde cittassa pakkhandattā ye uppādapaccayā kilesā nibbatteyyuṁ, te ajātāyeva na jāyanti, anibbattāyeva na nibbattanti, anuppannāyeva na uppajjanti, apātubhūtāyeva na pātubhavanti.

ps3.3:18.13.pli: Pavattaṁ hetu, nimittaṁ hetu, āyūhanā hetu.

ps3.3:18.15.pli: Āyūhane ādīnavaṁ disvā anāyūhane cittaṁ pakkhandati.

ps3.3:18.16.pli: Anāyūhane cittassa pakkhandattā, ye āyūhanapaccayā kilesā nibbatteyyuṁ, te ajātāyeva na jāyanti, anibbattāyeva na nibbattanti, anuppannāyeva na uppajjanti, apātubhūtāyeva na pātubhavanti.

ps3.3:18.18.pli: Evaṁ atthi maggabhāvanā, atthi phalasacchikiriyā, atthi kilesappahānaṁ, atthi dhammābhisamayoti.

ps3.4:1.2.pli: “Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti, sabbe te pathaviṁ nissāya pathaviyaṁ patiṭṭhāya evamete balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti;

ps3.4:1.3.pli: evamevaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bhāveti, ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bahulīkaroti.

ps3.4:2.1.pli: Kathañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bhāveti, ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bahulīkaroti?

ps3.4:2.2.pli: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sammādiṭṭhiṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vosaggapariṇāmiṁ.

ps3.4:2.9.pli: sammāsamādhiṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vosaggapariṇāmiṁ.

ps3.4:2.10.pli: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bhāveti, ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bahulīkaroti.

ps3.4:3.1.pli: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṁ viruḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjanti, sabbe te pathaviṁ nissāya pathaviyaṁ patiṭṭhāya evamete bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṁ viruḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjanti;

ps3.4:3.2.pli: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bhāvento ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bahulīkaronto vuddhiṁ viruḷhiṁ vepullaṁ pāpuṇāti dhammesu.

ps3.4:4.1.pli: Kathañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bhāvento ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bahulīkaronto vuddhiṁ viruḷhiṁ vepullaṁ pāpuṇāti dhammesu?

ps3.4:4.2.pli: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sammādiṭṭhiṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vosaggapariṇāmiṁ.

ps3.4:4.9.pli: sammāsamādhiṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vosaggapariṇāmiṁ.

ps3.4:4.10.pli: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bhāvento ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ bahulīkaronto vuddhiṁ viruḷhiṁ vepullaṁ pāpuṇāti dhammesū”ti.

ps3.4:5.1.pli: Sammādiṭṭhiyā pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayā.

ps3.4:5.8.pli: sammāsamādhissa pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayā.

ps3.4:6.3.pli: Vikkhambhanaviveko ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅgaviveko ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedaviveko ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhiviveko ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇaviveko ca nirodho nibbānaṁ.

ps3.4:6.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu vivekesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:7.3.pli: Vikkhambhanavirāgo ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavirāgo ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedavirāgo ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivirāgo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavirāgo ca nirodho nibbānaṁ.

ps3.4:7.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu virāgesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:8.3.pli: Vikkhambhananirodho ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅganirodho ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedanirodho ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhinirodho ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇanirodho ca amatā dhātu.

ps3.4:8.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu nirodhesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:9.3.pli: Vikkhambhanavosaggo ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavosaggo ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedavosaggo ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivosaggo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavosaggo ca nirodho nibbānaṁ.

ps3.4:9.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu vosaggesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:9.6.pli: Sammādiṭṭhiyā ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayā.

ps3.4:10.9.pli: Vikkhambhanaviveko ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅgaviveko ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedaviveko ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhiviveko ca phalakkhaṇe nissaraṇaviveko ca nirodho nibbānaṁ.

ps3.4:10.11.pli: Imesu pañcasu vivekesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:11.3.pli: Vikkhambhanavirāgo ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavirāgo ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedavirāgo ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivirāgo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavirāgo ca nirodho nibbānaṁ.

ps3.4:11.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu virāgesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:12.3.pli: Vikkhambhananirodho ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅganirodho ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedanirodho ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhinirodho ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇanirodho ca amatā dhātu.

ps3.4:12.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu nirodhesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:13.3.pli: Vikkhambhanavosaggo ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅgavosaggo ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedavosaggo ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhivosaggo ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇavosaggo ca nirodho nibbānaṁ.

ps3.4:13.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu vosaggesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ.

ps3.4:13.6.pli: Sammāsamādhissa ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayā.

ps3.4:14.1.pli: “Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti, sabbe te pathaviṁ nissāya pathaviyaṁ patiṭṭhāya evamete balakaraṇīyā kammantā karīyanti;

ps3.4:14.2.pli: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya satta bojjhaṅge bhāveti, satta bojjhaṅge bahulīkaroti …pe…

ps3.4:14.3.pli: satta bojjhaṅge bhāvento satta bojjhaṅge bahulīkaronto vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ pāpuṇāti dhammesu …pe…

ps3.4:14.4.pli: pañca balāni bhāveti, pañca balāni bahulīkaroti …pe…

ps3.4:14.5.pli: pañca balāni bhāvento pañca balāni bahulīkaronto vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ pāpuṇāti dhammesu …pe…

ps3.4:15.1.pli: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, ye keci bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjanti, sabbe te pathaviṁ nissāya pathaviyaṁ patiṭṭhāya evamete bījagāmabhūtagāmā vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjanti;

ps3.4:15.2.pli: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya pañcindriyāni bhāvento pañcindriyāni bahulīkaronto vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ pāpuṇāti dhammesu.

ps3.4:16.1.pli: Kathañca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya sīle patiṭṭhāya pañcindriyāni bhāvento pañcindriyāni bahulīkaronto vuddhiṁ virūḷhiṁ vepullaṁ pāpuṇāti dhammesu?

ps3.4:16.2.pli: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saddhindriyaṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vosaggapariṇāmiṁ.

ps3.4:16.6.pli: paññindriyaṁ bhāveti vivekanissitaṁ virāganissitaṁ nirodhanissitaṁ vosaggapariṇāmiṁ.

ps3.4:16.7.pli: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sīlaṁ nissāya …pe…

ps3.4:17.1.pli: Saddhindriyassa pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayā.

ps3.4:17.5.pli: paññindriyassa pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayā.

ps3.4:18.3.pli: Vikkhambhanaviveko ca nīvaraṇānaṁ paṭhamajjhānaṁ bhāvayato, tadaṅgaviveko ca diṭṭhigatānaṁ nibbedhabhāgiyaṁ samādhiṁ bhāvayato, samucchedaviveko ca lokuttaraṁ khayagāmimaggaṁ bhāvayato, paṭippassaddhiviveko ca phalakkhaṇe, nissaraṇaviveko ca nirodho nibbānaṁ.

ps3.4:18.5.pli: Imesu pañcasu vivekesu chandajāto hoti saddhādhimutto, cittañcassa svādhiṭṭhitaṁ …pe…

ps3.4:18.6.pli: saddhindriyassa ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayā.

ps3.4:19.6.pli: paññindriyassa ime pañca vivekā, pañca virāgā, pañca nirodhā, pañca vosaggā, dvādasa nissayāti.

ps3.5:1.2.pli: iriyāpathacariyā, āyatanacariyā, saticariyā, samādhicariyā, ñāṇacariyā, maggacariyā, patticariyā, lokatthacariyāti.

ps3.5:2.8.pli: Lokatthacariyāti tathāgatesu arahantesu sammāsambuddhesu padese paccekabuddhesu padese sāvakesu.

ps3.5:3.8.pli: Lokatthacariyā ca tathāgatānaṁ arahantānaṁ sammāsambuddhānaṁ padese paccekabuddhānaṁ padese sāvakānaṁ.

ps3.5:4.2.pli: Adhimuccanto saddhāya carati, paggaṇhanto vīriyena carati, upaṭṭhāpento satiyā carati, avikkhepaṁ karonto samādhinā carati, pajānanto paññāya carati, vijānanto viññāṇacariyāya carati, evaṁ paṭipannassa kusalā dhammā āyāpentīti āyatanacariyāya carati, evaṁ paṭipanno visesamadhigacchatīti visesacariyāya carati.

ps3.5:5.2.pli: Dassanacariyā ca sammādiṭṭhiyā, abhiniropanacariyā ca sammāsaṅkappassa, pariggahacariyā ca sammāvācāya, samuṭṭhānacariyā ca sammākammantassa, vodānacariyā ca sammāājīvassa, paggahacariyā ca sammāvāyāmassa, upaṭṭhānacariyā ca sammāsatiyā, avikkhepacariyā ca sammāsamādhissa.

ps3.6:2.2.pli: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco anekavihitaṁ iddhividhaṁ paccanubhoti—

ps3.6:2.3.pli: ekopi hutvā bahudhā hoti, bahudhāpi hutvā eko hoti;

ps3.6:3.3.pli: ‘evampi te mano, itthampi te mano, itipi te cittan’ti.

ps3.6:3.4.pli: So bahuñcepi ādisati, tatheva taṁ hoti, no aññathā.

ps3.6:3.5.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco na heva kho nimittena ādisati, api ca kho manussānaṁ vā amanussānaṁ vā devatānaṁ vā saddaṁ sutvā ādisati—

ps3.6:3.6.pli: ‘evampi te mano, itthampi te mano, itipi te cittan’ti.

ps3.6:3.7.pli: So bahuñcepi ādisati, tatheva taṁ hoti, no aññathā.

ps3.6:3.8.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco na heva kho nimittena ādisati, napi manussānaṁ vā amanussānaṁ vā devatānaṁ vā saddaṁ sutvā ādisati, api ca kho vitakkayato vicārayato vitakkavipphārasaddaṁ sutvā ādisati—

ps3.6:3.9.pli: ‘evampi te mano, itthampi te mano, itipi te cittan’ti.

ps3.6:3.10.pli: So bahuñcepi ādisati, tatheva taṁ hoti, no aññathā.

ps3.6:3.11.pli: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco na heva kho nimittena ādisati, napi manussānaṁ vā amanussānaṁ vā devatānaṁ vā saddaṁ sutvā ādisati, napi vitakkayato vicārayato vitakkavipphārasaddaṁ sutvā ādisati, api ca kho avitakkaṁ avicāraṁ samādhiṁ samāpannassa cetasā ceto paricca pajānāti—

ps3.6:3.12.pli: ‘yathā imassa bhoto manosaṅkhārā paṇihitā imassa cittassa anantarā amukaṁ nāma vitakkaṁ vitakkayissatī’ti.

ps3.6:3.13.pli: So bahuñcepi ādisati, tatheva taṁ hoti, no aññathā.

ps3.6:4.4.pli: Evaṁ manasi karotha, mā evaṁ manasākattha.

ps3.6:5.3.pli: Ye tena nekkhammena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:5.5.pli: “Taṁ kho pana nekkhammaṁ evaṁ āsevitabbaṁ, evaṁ bhāvetabbaṁ, evaṁ bahulīkātabbaṁ, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:6.3.pli: Ye tena abyāpādena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:6.5.pli: “So kho pana abyāpādo evaṁ āsevitabbo, evaṁ bhāvetabbo, evaṁ bahulīkātabbo, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:7.3.pli: Ye tāya ālokasaññāya samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:7.5.pli: “Sā kho pana ālokasaññā evaṁ āsevitabbā, evaṁ bhāvetabbā, evaṁ bahulīkātabbā, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:8.3.pli: Ye tena avikkhepena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:8.5.pli: “So kho pana avikkhepo evaṁ āsevitabbo, evaṁ bhāvetabbo, evaṁ bahulīkātabbo, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:9.3.pli: Ye tena dhammavavatthānena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:9.5.pli: “Taṁ kho pana dhammavavatthānaṁ evaṁ āsevitabbaṁ, evaṁ bhāvetabbaṁ, evaṁ bahulīkātabbaṁ, evaṁ tadanudhammatā, sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:10.3.pli: Ye tena ñāṇena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:10.5.pli: “Taṁ kho pana ñāṇaṁ evaṁ āsevitabbaṁ, evaṁ bhāvetabbaṁ, evaṁ bahulīkātabbaṁ, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:11.3.pli: Ye tena pāmojjena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:11.5.pli: “Taṁ kho pana pāmojjaṁ evaṁ āsevitabbaṁ, evaṁ bhāvetabbaṁ, evaṁ bahulīkātabbaṁ, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:12.3.pli: Ye tena paṭhamena jhānena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:12.5.pli: “Taṁ kho pana paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ evaṁ āsevitabbaṁ, evaṁ bhāvetabbaṁ, evaṁ bahulīkātabbaṁ, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:13.3.pli: Ye tena arahattamaggena samannāgatā, sabbe te visuddhacittā anāvilasaṅkappāti—

ps3.6:13.5.pli: “So kho pana arahattamaggo evaṁ āsevitabbo, evaṁ bhāvetabbo, evaṁ bahulīkātabbo, evaṁ tadanudhammatā sati upaṭṭhāpetabbā”ti—

ps3.6:14.3.pli: Yā ca iddhi yañca pāṭihāriyaṁ, idaṁ vuccati iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ.

ps3.6:14.6.pli: Yā ca iddhi yañca pāṭihāriyaṁ, idaṁ vuccati iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ.

ps3.6:14.11.pli: Yā ca iddhi yañca pāṭihāriyaṁ, idaṁ vuccati iddhipāṭihāriyanti.

ps3.7:1.1.pli: Sabbadhammānaṁ sammāsamucchede nirodhe ca anupaṭṭhānatā paññā samasīsaṭṭhe ñāṇaṁ.

ps3.7:2.1.pli: Sabbadhammānanti pañcakkhandhā, dvādasāyatanāni, aṭṭhārasa dhātuyo, kusalā dhammā, akusalā dhammā, abyākatā dhammā, kāmāvacarā dhammā, rūpāvacarā dhammā, arūpāvacarā dhammā, apariyāpannā dhammā.

ps3.7:2.2.pli: Sammā samucchedeti nekkhammena kāmacchandaṁ sammā samucchindati, abyāpādena byāpādaṁ sammā samucchindati, ālokasaññāya thinamiddhaṁ sammā samucchindati, avikkhepena uddhaccaṁ sammā samucchindati, dhammavavatthānena vicikicchaṁ sammā samucchindati, ñāṇena avijjaṁ sammā samucchindati, pāmojjena aratiṁ sammā samucchindati, paṭhamena jhānena nīvaraṇe sammā samucchindati …pe…

ps3.7:3.1.pli: Nirodheti nekkhammena kāmacchandaṁ nirodheti, abyāpādena byāpādaṁ nirodheti, ālokasaññāya thinamiddhaṁ nirodheti, avikkhepena uddhaccaṁ nirodheti, dhammavavatthānena vicikicchaṁ nirodheti, ñāṇena avijjaṁ nirodheti, pāmojjena aratiṁ nirodheti, paṭhamena jhānena nīvaraṇe nirodheti …pe…

ps3.7:4.1.pli: Anupaṭṭhānatāti nekkhammaṁ paṭiladdhassa kāmacchando na upaṭṭhāti, abyāpādaṁ paṭiladdhassa byāpādo na upaṭṭhāti, ālokasaññaṁ paṭiladdhassa thinamiddhaṁ na upaṭṭhāti, avikkhepaṁ paṭiladdhassa uddhaccaṁ na upaṭṭhāti, dhammavavatthānaṁ paṭiladdhassa vicikicchā na upaṭṭhāti, ñāṇaṁ paṭiladdhassa avijjā na upaṭṭhāti, pāmojjaṁ paṭiladdhassa arati na upaṭṭhāti, paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ paṭiladdhassa nīvaraṇā na upaṭṭhanti …pe…

ps3.7:5.1.pli: Samanti kāmacchandassa pahīnattā nekkhammaṁ samaṁ, byāpādassa pahīnattā abyāpādo samaṁ, thinamiddhassa pahīnattā ālokasaññā samaṁ, uddhaccassa pahīnattā avikkhepo samaṁ, vicikicchāya pahīnattā dhammavavatthānaṁ samaṁ, avijjāya pahīnattā ñāṇaṁ samaṁ, aratiyā pahīnattā pāmojjaṁ samaṁ, nīvaraṇānaṁ pahīnattā paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ samaṁ …pe…

ps3.7:6.2.pli: palibodhasīsañca taṇhā, vinibandhanasīsañca māno, parāmāsasīsañca diṭṭhi, vikkhepasīsañca uddhaccaṁ, saṅkilesasīsañca avijjā, adhimokkhasīsañca saddhā, paggahasīsañca vīriyaṁ, upaṭṭhānasīsañca sati, avikkhepasīsañca samādhi, dassanasīsañca paññā, pavattasīsañca jīvitindriyaṁ, gocarasīsañca vimokkho, saṅkhārasīsañca nirodhoti.
